original_text:
### Brand Accent Shape (core container device)
- A rectangle with **selectively enlarged opposite corner radii**; the other two corners keep a slight radius. Used to house callout text and photography. Reads modern and optimistic.
- Approved radius pairs (print): **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes).
- **[GENERAL] Email px conversions (at 96dpi):** large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px. Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair. Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right).
- **Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners** (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]

relations.note: Defines the approved print-specific radius pairs for the core accent-shape device.
Defines email-specific accent-shape radius conversions and orientation consistency.
Charts are exempt from the email asymmetric accent-shape treatment.

quotes: A rectangle with **selectively enlarged opposite corner radii**; the other two corners keep a slight radius. Used to house callout text and photography. Reads modern and optimistic.

rules.intent: Maintain the modern, optimistic core container device.
rules.rule_text: Use the Brand Accent Shape as a rectangular container with selectively enlarged opposite corner radii and slight radii on the remaining two corners, for callout text and photography.

quotes: Approved radius pairs (print): **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes).

rules.intent: Preserve the approved print implementations of the accent shape.
rules.rule_text: In print, use the approved accent-shape radius pairs: 1.25in and 0.0625in for large containers/photos, 0.5in and 0.0625in for banners, and 0.4375in and 0.0625in for small callout boxes.

quotes: large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px. Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair. Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right).

**[GENERAL] Email px conversions (at 96dpi):** large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px. Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair. Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right).

rules.intent: Ensure consistent asymmetric accent-shape geometry throughout an email.
rules.rule_text: For email at 96dpi, use the approved large, banner, or callout accent-shape radius treatment (for example, 120px/6px for large and 48px/6px for banners). Put the large radius on one diagonal pair and the 6px radius on the other; keep the same diagonal orientation across every section in an email, defaulting to large radii at top-left and bottom-right.

quotes: Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]
Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]

rules.intent: Keep data-display containers visually regular and distinct from accent-shape containers.
rules.rule_text: Charts and tables are an exception to the asymmetric accent shape: use uniform 12px rounded corners on all four corners.

- **[GENERAL] Email px conversions (at 96dpi):** large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px. Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair. Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right).
- **Exception: charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners** (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.]

rules.intent: Bind the Brand Accent Shape (core container device) table values verbatim.
rules.rule_text:
The Brand Accent Shape (core container device) table is a closed, brand-approved set; every row binds its listed values exactly as specified. Do not invent or alter rows.

| item | value |
|---|---|
| Approved radius pairs (print) | **1.25" & 0.0625"** (large containers/photos), **0.5" & 0.0625"** (banners), **0.4375" & 0.0625"** (small callout boxes). |
| [GENERAL] Email px conversions (at 96dpi) | ** large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px. Apply the large radius to one diagonal pair (e.g., top-left + bottom-right), the 6px radius to the other pair. Be consistent within an email: same diagonal orientation across all sections (default: large radius top-left & bottom-right). |
| Exception | charts and tables use uniform rounded corners on all four corners** (not the asymmetric accent shape). [GENERAL: 12px uniform radius.] |
